title: Lesson 299: 相, 総, 添う...

items.gloss: appearance; look; countenance; a 'seeming' that fortune-tellers relate to one's fortune; aspect; phase (e.g. solid, liquid and gaseous)
whole; all; general; gross; entire; overall

to meet (wishes, expectations, etc.); to satisfy; to comply with; to live up to; to accompany; to go with; to stay by one's side; to associate with (someone); to mix with; to marry; to wed; to be added
traditional Japanese wind instrument resembling panpipes; free-reed instrument used in Japanese court music
